untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Candlestick color confirmation of breakout direction' which depends on prior chart pattern identification (breakout type and direction). The breakout pattern itself is not quantifiable with allowed indicators alone. Candlestick body direction (positive/negative close) is translatable, but confirmation requires external pattern context not available in indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated candlestick color confirmation as body sign reversal (positive body = bullish, negative body = bearish). Used average_rise_pct (-5.53%) as stop_loss reference. Performance metrics (average_rise_pct: -5.53%, average_decline_pct: -9.64%) indicate this pattern historically underperforms. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT are implemented as simple reversal logic (opposite body sign). Requires external chart pattern detection to fully implement as intended.
